rulings.Case Title: NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, INC. VS. THYESIA BACON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Breach Of Stipulation
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday March 11, 2019 line 5. PLAINTIFF NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, INC. Notice Of Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Breach Of Stipulation OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1013 and CCP 1013. It also appears (based on the Proof of Service on file) that the motion was served directly on defendant who is represented by counsel. =(501/REQ)

Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday March 11, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT KEVIN MORRIS MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT GRANTED with leave to amend to address issues raised by the motion. =(501/REQ)
